posts.text:
Some projects launch with promises.
We decided to launch with code. 🧪

Today, the 0XB20 Laboratory GitHub becomes public.

🔹 Open architecture
🔹 Open experiments
🔹 Open development
🔹 Public research
🔹 Real Web3 tools

Every commit is another step in the evolution of the Laboratory.

⚙️ Explore it.
 🍴 Fork it.
🛠️ Break it.
🚀 Improve it.

🔗 GitHub https://t.co/bwJJpcxGI5

Research. Build. Evolve.
Built on @base 💙

#OpenSource #BuildInPublic #BuildOnBase #Base #Web3 #Ethereum

🧪 Laboratory Status Update

No hype today.

Just building.

If you've been visiting https://t.co/t3CuEMAKCG lately, you may have noticed something...

The Laboratory has been changing almost every day.

Some updates are obvious.

Some are hidden beneath the surface.

Over the past weeks we've been rebuilding the foundation:

⚗️ New infrastructure
🔐 Stronger security
🧩 Cleaner architecture
🛠️ New experimental tools
📚 Public GitHub is almost ready.
The most observant visitors already know...
The Laboratory never really stands still.
More experiments are coming.
Research. Build. Evolve.

🌐 https://t.co/t3CuEMAKCG

Built on @base

posts.text:
🧪 WEEKLY LAB REPORT // WEEK 1

One week.

A lot happened.

This week's experiments:

✅ Research Terminal launched

✅ AI LAB released

✅ Automatic X → Research synchronization

✅ Evolution protocol documented

✅ Wallet integration experiments started

✅ Laboratory architecture continues to evolve

We also learned a few things...

• Shipping beats waiting.
• Small releases compound faster than perfect plans.
• Building in public keeps us accountable.
Next experiment:
👀 Let's see where the wallet takes us.

Research never ends.

@base @BuildOnBase @jessepollak @OpenAI

🧪 This week we're experimenting with secure wallet integration inside 0XB20 Laboratory.

No approvals.
No token transfers.
No spending permissions.
Just a safe connection, wallet inspection and message signing.
We don't even know exactly where this experiment will lead yet...

Maybe AI LAB personalization.
Maybe onchain research.
Maybe something completely different.

That's the fun part of building in public.

Built on Base. ⚡

posts.text:
Here's how it works.
Type literally one word.
Or a sentence.
Or an observation.

Choose a generation style:
• Builder
• Brutal
• Philosophy
• Funny
• Minimal
• Random

Then press Generate Signal.
A few seconds later...
AI LAB builds a complete idea ready for X.

No prompts.
No prompt engineering.
Just a thought.

@OpenAI @buildonbase

#AI #Web3 #Base

posts.text:
🧪 TERMINAL LOG #021
⚠️ INCIDENT REPORT

INCIDENT #001

Unknown parasites infected Windows.
STATUS:
🟡 System partially recovered.
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
INCIDENT #002

Unknown parasites infected X.
STATUS:
🔵 Account migrated.
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
INCIDENT #003

Unknown parasites infected the Operator.
STATUS:
🔴 Operator offline.
Entering recovery mode...
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
LAB UPDATE

🧠 AI LAB development has officially begun.
Current progress may appear slower than expected.
Reason: The Operator is only partially alive.
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
Current hypothesis:
The parasites have evolved.
They no longer attack systems.
They attack researchers.

🧪 Research continues.
 Recovery is temporary.
 The experiment isn't.

posts.author: 0xb20 ✧ WOJAK.LTD ✧ base.eth
posts.text:
🧪 TERMINAL LOG #020

Funny how things change.

A week ago this was just an idea.

Now the Laboratory has its own Research Terminal.

At first we tried writing every log by hand.

It worked...

...until we realized we were spending more time documenting the project than actually building it.

So we changed the experiment.

From now on, the Laboratory documents itself.

Every important update from our X account automatically becomes part of the Research Terminal.

The old logs aren't gone.

They're staying exactly where they belong—as the prototype archive that tells the story of how this project started.

The archive ends here.

The Research begins.

If you're curious how we're building this in public, take a look.

🔬 https://t.co/AVO8be5mQN

Still rough around the edges?

Absolutely.

We're building it live.

And that's the whole point.

@base @BuildOnBase @jessepollak @0xExchange

#Base #BuildOnBase #BaseBuilders #Onchain #Web3 #Research #BuildInPublic #Crypto

Today's researcher isn't human.

It's Codex.

Task:
→ Refactor the Research module.
→ Improve stability.
→ Prepare the architecture for future evolution.
We're treating AI like another instrument inside the Laboratory.
Not magic.
Not hype.

Just another tool helping us build faster.

The best AI projects won't replace humans.

They'll amplify curious builders.

Research never ends.

🌐 https://t.co/zhRsCW6hCj

posts.author: 0xb20 ✧ WOJAK.LTD ✧ base.eth
posts.text:
🧪 ALGORITHM EXPERIMENT #003

Day 3.

Unexpected observation.

Apparently, asking people to take free tokens is harder than expected.

Current participant count:

0 🫠

Maybe the reward wasn't interesting enough.

So the Laboratory is adjusting the parameters.

Protocol Update

🎁 Reward per participant:

100,000 → 200,000 $0XB20

(Laboratory budget remains 3,000,000 $0XB20.)

Participation protocol:

🔁 Repost this post.

💬 Drop your Base wallet in the comments (or DM if you prefer).

That's it.

Also...

Today marks one full week since the experiment began.

The token survived.

The Laboratory survived.

And we're still building every single day.

Research never ends. 🧪

🌐 https://t.co/t3CuEMAKCG

posts.author: 0xb20 ✧ WOJAK.LTD ✧ base.eth
posts.text:
TERMINAL LOG #018

🧪 RESEARCH TERMINAL IS NOW ONLINE.

Today we're opening the first public version of the Research Module.

It isn't perfect.

And that's exactly the point.

Instead of waiting months to build the "perfect" product, we're releasing the prototype now and improving it in public.

Current version can already:
🔹 Observe Base ecosystem accounts.
🔹 Collect live observations.
🔹 Search and filter signals.
🔹 Build the foundation for future research tools.

Behind the scenes we're still fighting X scraping limitations, improving infrastructure and experimenting with different approaches.
The Laboratory isn't shipping finished products.
It documents evolution.
Every update.
Every mistake.
Every improvement.

Research never ends.

👀 Curious people might even find a way inside before the official presentation...

🔬 https://t.co/7KFfrol2oj

@base @buildonbase @jessepollak @cbventures @a16zcrypto @o1_exchange
#BuildOnBase #Base #BaseBuilders #Onchain #Crypto #Research #Web3 #OpenBuild #0XB20

posts.author: 0xb20 ✧ WOJAK.LTD ✧ base.eth
posts.text:
FIELD LOG #005 🐈🧪

The Laboratory generated its first protocol commissions.
Not millions. Not VC funding. Not an investor.
Just a few dollars earned because people traded our token.
Today those commissions bought food for four tiny laboratory assistants. 🐈
The experiment keeps proving something simple:
Build something real. Let it create value. Reinvest it back into the Laboratory.
Today it was cat food. Tomorrow it might be infrastructure. Then new research tools. Then something even bigger.
Every trade keeps the experiment alive.
Research never ends.

🎥 Field footage attached.

🔬 https://t.co/zhRsCW5JML

posts.author: 0xb20 ✧ WOJAK.LTD ✧ base.eth
posts.text:
🚧 FIELD LOG #004

Touch grass they said... 🌿

So I did...

Now the Laboratory is being built from the middle of a flower field.
Today we're working on a new Research module that automatically tracks the Base ecosystem, builders, protocols and ecosystem signals in one place.
No paid APIs. No enterprise budget. Just curiosity, open-source tools and too much coffee. ☕
Maybe this is what touching grass actually means.

Build. Learn. Repeat.

@base @buildonbase @jessepollak @o1_exchange @stambouli_o1

🧪 0XB20 Laboratory never sleeps. (Well... maybe after this post. 😴)

#BuildInPublic #Base #Onchain #Crypto #Web3 #BuildOnBase #IndieHackers #ai架空映画ポスター #ETH

posts.author: 0xb20 ✧ WOJAK.LTD ✧ base.eth
posts.text:
📁 ARCHIVE FILE RECOVERED

Before 0xb20...
There was another experiment.

@EVA_404_EVA .

A virtual AI artist.
Albums.
Original artwork.
Stories.
Music.
An entire universe built around one character.
I honestly thought it would become my main project.
It didn't.
The algorithms had other plans.
But looking back...
Without EVA_404 there would never have been a Laboratory.
That's where I learned how to build worlds instead of products.
Sometimes experiments don't fail.
They simply evolve into something unexpected.
Maybe one day EVA_404 will wake up again.

🎵 Listen here:
https://t.co/ZnIMIwLfuD

Research never ends.

#AIMusic #ElectronicMusic #AIArt #EDM #Hyperpop #Creator #0xb20

posts.author: 0xb20 ✧ WOJAK.LTD ✧ base.eth
posts.text:
🧪 TERMINAL LOG #016

⚠️ CONTENT EXPERIMENT INITIALIZED

The Laboratory has been operating... mostly on chaos.
Time to test something different.
For the next few weeks we'll follow a structured publishing protocol.
Not because it's optimal.
Because I'm curious
Can consistency outperform randomness?
Can discipline beat the algorithm?
We'll find out together.
Every post becomes another data point.
Every reaction becomes part of the research.
Let's see if I can follow my own protocol. 🧪
Research never ends.

🔬 https://t.co/zhRsCW6hCj

posts.author: 0xb20 ✧ WOJAK.LTD ✧ base.eth
posts.text:
📍 FIELD LOG #003
New laboratory assistant has been detected.
Status: Suspiciously adorable. 🐈
She appeared out of nowhere near the Laboratory.
Now there are:
2 quails 🐦
a cat with 3 kittens 🐈
an old garden full of cherries 🍒
one very sleep-deprived builder ☕
...and somehow we're also running a memecoin.
People often imagine crypto founders sitting in skyscrapers.
Reality is a little different.
I'm an overnight security guard. During the day I take care of this old garden. Between shifts I build 0xb20.
Every website update. Every bug. Every incident. Every strange idea.
It's all built from here.
Maybe that's why I decided to make the entire project public.
No fake luxury. No fake team. No fake story.
Just one weird laboratory trying to survive and build something worth remembering.
Research never ends. 🧪

🔬 https://t.co/zhRsCW5JML⁠�

#0xb20 #BuildOnBase #Base #Crypto #Memecoin #IndieHackers

posts.author: 0xb20 ✧ WOJAK.LTD ✧ base.eth
posts.text:
🧪 TERMINAL LOG #012
 📅 Jul 14, 2026
 🟢 STATUS: OPERATIONAL
🤖 AI ASSISTANCE PROTOCOL INITIATED
Cognitive resources reached critical levels.

At approximately 03:00, the Laboratory delegated Telegram infrastructure deployment to an AI assistant.

Assigned temporary role:
👨‍💻 DevOps Engineer (Perplexity)

Unexpected result:
✅ Raid System — ONLINE
✅ Protection Layer — ACTIVE
✅ Infrastructure — OPERATIONAL
✅ Researchers' sanity — PARTIALLY RECOVERED

Turns out even laboratories need another brain sometimes.
Every system we build becomes another step in the experiment.

Research never ends.
🌐 https://t.co/zhRsCW6hCj
